title: premna henryana
intro: Premna henryana, also known as Henry's tree or Henry's ironwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Premna henryana has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory infections, and improving digestion. Premna henryana is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
